query: SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='cloud_runs' AND column_name IN ('automation_id','automation_version','triggered_by','inputs') ORDER BY column_name;
additional_constraints: cloud_runs_triggered_by_check               CHECK (triggered_by IS NULL OR triggered_by IN ('manual','schedule','composio_webhook'))
cloud_runs_automation_idx                   INDEX (automation_id, created_at DESC) WHERE automation_id IS NOT NULL
